item.title: Recent Updates + sth else
item.description: So Kenneth, where did you go these days? Well, it’s a loooong story. But I’ll try to tell you in detailed. After I posted a post in 23/06/25, I was been surrounded by tones of schoolwork and projects. (You know, that’s how Chinese students’ everyday belike) So this blog was left unfinished and the site owner seemed like dead. (Just Kidding) Actually I was preparing for my TOEFL exam during Oct.

item.title: Blog Update
item.description: 最近Kenneth的博客推送了一些新的改进： 更改域名为liuu.org 并添加了SEO搜索，现在可以在bing和google上找到我啦>

item.title: Long time no see!
item.description: Glad to see you again! I know it’s such a long time that I haven’t posted anything new on my blog, it is all because we are having a exam last week and I have to review everything I learned just to get a good grade on the final score. No don’t try to ask me I will never tell you my score LOL. So apparently the exam is over and we are going to have Summer Holidays!

item.title: How to use a happy mood to face a brand new week
item.description: Oh another busy week! Still a looooooooooooooot of things is waiting for me to do, but I’m sure I’ll deal them. Mass mags are still hard though. Hoping review and some preparation’s might let it be more easier. But I also want to share a good news is that I found that Steam in Hong Kong can use WeChat pay direcly, and there’s no limit with the variety of the game than Steam in Mainland!

item.title: Last day of the Week!
item.description: Another boring week, but I finished building my website, that’s kinda of success? Well maybe it wasn’t that boring because I figured out how to insert an image into a post, maybe I’ll try to insert an gif someday in the future. All right seems works now. I’m starting to love this hugo blog. But I Stephen don’t know how to use algolia search in this website, it won’t show

item.title: A list of things waiting to do...
item.description: I decided to make a list that include all the things I want to do or I should do. So here it comes, at the top bar of the blog. So the first thing and the most important thing I want to do is to go into stanford. Maybe you think it’s impossible or very hard to achive. Same as me, for now I’m not good in mathematics so going into standford university is impossible.

item.title: 来画饼！
item.description: 这应该是我第一篇中文的博客吧， 光全是英文的话没什么意思，偶尔换换语言也挺好的。 这一篇主要是想想这个网站该怎么搞，目前为止应该是有很多功能缺失

item.title: Friday! Yeah!
item.description: Yooo! It’s Friday. The happiest day in the week must be Friday, because you’ll have two days for rest and do things whenever you like! :D But I had to take lessons during weekend, not cool, still I can working on with my blog and post some new things up to it. I just misdelated all the files that were used for deploy the blog(That’s why i didn’t post anything

item.title: Greetings and...
item.description: Hi everyone, apparently, this is a blog I have created just now. I’ll post something on it. It could be my daily life, something that I was interested in and so on. If you want to ask me why did I bulid this blog. I will tell you that it is my hobby. I’ll try to keep on daily upload, if I didn’t write anything for so long you can just ping me.

item.title: Python level-5 Certificate!
item.description: Ohhhhhh! Just received my python level five certificate from Chinese Institute Of Electronics. I cannot express how excited I am to receive this unique certificate. You see, the Python levels certificate from Chinese Institute Of Electronics is divided into six levels and I already made five of them! That means I’ll be “graduate” from python after I get

item.title: Short intro
item.description: Hi this is Kenneth, maybe you’re thinking why did I build this site. It’s just about sharing my thoughts and my opinions about something. Or just keeping some crazy ideas that were unreachable for now.(Or you can just called it a diary) Yes I want some place can store all my colorful emotions and show my personalities. If you are reading this
